blockedReason: Stitch screen onboarding evidence is mixed with common Stitch/Unity MCP capability or policy edits. Stop and split the work: zero-touch onboarding must not mutate shared logic; capability expansion must be declared and validated as a separate lane.

requiredEvidence.name: compile-reload
requiredEvidence.message: Compile and script reload must settle before Unity UI workflow evidence is trusted.

requiredEvidence.name: presentation-layout-ownership
requiredEvidence.message: Presentation code must not author geometry or materials. Move the authoring to scene/prefab or runtime non-presentation layer.

requiredEvidence.name: presentation-responsibility
requiredEvidence.message: Presentation PageController classes must stay thin. Smoke entrypoints, chrome styling, and oversized orchestration fail the workflow.
